description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Individual train trip will be delayed

2026-03-13T19:55:00.CONTENT_EN: High Speed Rail train G6514 departing from Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Guangzhounan Station will be delayed around 45 mins. For latest train schedules, please refer to 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app. You may also check latest train information from the HSR website, mobile app or the information available at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.
2026-03-13T19:55:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於列車機件故障，由香港西九龍站開往廣州南站的高速鐵路列車車次G6514，將延遲大約45分鐘開出。 有關車次的資料，請留意12306官方網站(12306.cn)，或手機應用程式。您亦可留意於高速鐵路網頁、手機應用程式或香港西九龍站發放的最新資訊。

2026-03-13T20:09:00.CONTENT_EN: High Speed Rail train G6514 departing from Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Guangzhounan Station will be delayed around 45 mins due to a technical fault. For latest train schedules, please refer to 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app. You may also check latest train information from the HSR website, mobile app or the information available at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.
2026-03-13T20:09:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於列車機件故障，由香港西九龍站開往廣州南站的高速鐵路列車車次G6514，將延遲大約45分鐘開出。 有關車次的資料，請留意12306官方網站(12306.cn)，或手機應用程式。您亦可留意於高速鐵路網頁、手機應用程式或香港西九龍站發放的最新資訊。

2026-03-15T16:06:00.CONTENT_EN: All car parks at West Kowloon Cultural District are full. Members of the public are encouraged to take public transport to the West Kowloon Cultural District.
2026-03-15T16:06:00.CONTENT_CN: 西九文化區內所有停車場現已泊滿車輛，前往西九文化區一帶的市民請使用公共交通工具。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Taxi service for concert at the Kai Tak Stadium (15 March 2026)
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 啟德主場館演唱會的士服務(2026年3月15日)

2026-03-15T22:30:00.CONTENT_EN: It is the peak dispersal period of concert at the Kai Tak Stadium, the passenger queue for taxi service at the Kai Tak Stadium Taxi Pick-up/Drop-off Area is relatively long and it would take some time for boarding the taxis. Spectators are advised to use the MTR to leave the Kai Tak Sports Park. Spectators are advised to take heed of the real-time information via on-site broadcast and the "Easy Leave" (easyleave. police. gov. hk) as well as the latest traffic news through the TD's website (www. td. gov. hk), the "HKeMobility" mobile application, radio and television broadcasts.
2026-03-15T22:30:00.CONTENT_CN: 現時為啟德主場館演唱會散場人流高峰時段，啟德主場館的士上落客區現時輪候人數較多，輪候時間會較長。觀眾請選擇乘搭港鐵離開啟德體育園。 　　觀眾請留意場地廣播和「離場易」（easyleave.police.gov.hk）提供的實時資訊，以及經運輸署網頁（www.td.gov.hk）、「香港出行易」流動應用程式、電台和電視台發放的最新交通消息。
